entry.title: [NFLNBC] Will Aaron Donald really unretire and play for the Rams? | Chris Simms Unbuttoned | NFL on NBC
entry.summary:
Chris Simms reveals his conversations with Aaron Donald and questions if the future Hall of Famer will come out of retirement and attempt to win another Super Bowl with the Los Angeles Rams. #NBCSports #NFL #ChrisSimmsUnbuttoned » Watch Live Sports on Peacock: https://peacocktv.smart.link/v82e9dl56 » Subscribe to NFL on NBC: https://www.youtube.com/NFLonNBC?sub_confirmation=1
NBC Sports Group serves sports fans 24/7 with premier live events, insightful studio shows, and compelling original programming. NBC Sports is an established leader in the sports media landscape with an unparalleled collection of sports properties that include the Olympics, NFL, NBA, Premier League, Big Ten, NASCAR, PGA TOUR, the Kentucky Derby, Tour de France and many more. Subscribe to our channel for the latest sporting news and highlights!
'Chris Simms Unbuttoned' features in-depth Xs and Os NFL analysis; one-on-one interviews with players, coaches, executives, and draft prospects; game recaps and previews; gambling segments; extensive player analysis leading into the NFL draft; and much more.
Watch more from NBC Sports on YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/nbcsports Visit NBC Sports: https://www.nbcsports.com Find NBC Sports on Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/NBCSports Follow NBC Sports on Twitter: https://twitter.com/nbcsports Follow NBC Sports on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/nbcsports/

entry.title: [NFLNBC] Mike Florio talks Cardinals betting scandal, turf vs. grass debate | Dan Patrick Show | NFL on NBC
entry.summary:
Mike Florio joins Dan Patrick to discuss the reported gambling scandal around the Cardinals, Aaron Donald's potential Rams return and more. #NBCSports #NFL #SundayNightFootball
» Watch SNF on Peacock: https://peacocktv.smart.link/v82e9dl56 » Subscribe to NFL on NBC: https://www.youtube.com/NFLonNBC?sub_confirmation=1 » Get more NFL news on NBC Sports: https://www.nbcsports.com/nfl
NBC Sports Group serves sports fans 24/7 with premier live events, insightful studio shows, and compelling original programming. NBC Sports is an established leader in the sports media landscape with an unparalleled collection of sports properties that include the Olympics, NFL, NBA, Premier League, Big Ten, NASCAR, PGA TOUR, the Kentucky Derby, Tour de France and many more. Subscribe to our channel for the latest sporting news and highlights!
Sunday Night is Football Night on NBC as SNF continues to be America’s #1 Primetime show. NBC is also home to two NFL playoff games each season – one Wild Card Playoff game and one Divisional Playoff game – and offers full streaming rights on NBC Sports.com and the NBC Sports App.
Emmy Award winners Cris Collinsworth and Mike Tirico follow all the action from the booth, along with Melissa Stark from the field.
Watch more from NFL on NBC YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/nflonnbc Visit NBC Sports: https://www.nbcsports.com Find NBC Sports on Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/NBCSports Follow NBC Sports on Twitter: https://twitter.com/nbcsports Follow NBC Sports on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/nbcsports/

entry.summary:

entry.title: [NFLNBC] PFT PM Mailbag: Where will Stefon Diggs, Deebo Samuel end up? | Pro Football Talk | NFL on NBC
entry.summary:
Mike Florio discusses the futures of Stefon Diggs and Deebo Samuel, Vita Vea's contract outlook in Tampa Bay, the Seahawks' sale process and whether expectations for the Detroit Lions are too high entering the season. questions from the mailbag. #NBCSports #NFL #ProFootballTalk #WorldCup » Watch Pro Football Talk live on Peacock weekdays 7a-9a: https://peacocktv.smart.link/v82e9dl56 » Subscribe to NFL on NBC: https://www.youtube.com/NFLonNBC?sub_confirmation=1 » Get the latest from Pro Football Talk: https://profootballtalk.nbcsports.com/

Subscribe to our channel for the latest sporting news and highlights!

entry.title: [NFLNBC] Alvin Kamara remains with Saints; Falcons QB competition | PFT PM (FULL) | NFL on NBC
entry.summary:

» Watch Pro Football Talk live on Peacock weekdays 7a-9a: https://peacocktv.smart.link/v82e9dl56
» Subscribe to NFL on NBC: https://www.youtube.com/NFLonNBC?sub_confirmation=1
» Get the latest from Pro Football Talk: https://profootballtalk.nbcsports.com/

NBC Sports Group serves sports fans 24/7 with premier live events, insightful studio shows, and compelling original programming. NBC Sports is an established leader in the sports media landscape with an unparalleled collection of sports properties that include the Olympics, NFL, NBA, Premier League, Big Ten, NASCAR, PGA TOUR, the Kentucky Derby, Tour de France and many more. Subscribe to our channel for the latest sporting news and highlights!

Mike Florio, creator of the industry-leading Profootballtalk.com, offers his NFL insight alongside regular guests, including former NFL athletes such as Chris Simms. Pro Football Talk informs and entertains with the most up-to-date news and analysis surrounding the topical NFL stories of the day.

entry.title: [NFLNBC] Jason Garrett reveals Mount Rushmore of all-time NFL quarterbacks | Dan Patrick Show | NFL on NBC
entry.summary:
Jason Garrett joins Dan Patrick to discuss what makes a great coach, the way coaches communicate with each other week-to-week and his Mount Rushmore of all-time NFL quarterbacks. #NBCSports #NFLonNBC #DanPatrickShow » Watch SNF on Peacock: https://peacocktv.smart.link/v82e9dl56 » Subscribe to NFL on NBC: https://www.youtube.com/NFLonNBC?sub_confirmation=1 » Get more NFL news on NBC Sports: https://www.nbcsports.com/nfl
NBC Sports Group serves sports fans 24/7 with premier live events, insightful studio shows, and compelling original programming. NBC Sports is an established leader in the sports media landscape with an unparalleled collection of sports properties that include the Olympics, NFL, NBA, Premier League, Big Ten, NASCAR, PGA TOUR, the Kentucky Derby, Tour de France and many more. Subscribe to our channel for the latest sporting news and highlights!
Sunday Night is Football Night on NBC as SNF continues to be America’s #1 Primetime show. NBC is also home to two NFL playoff games each season – one Wild Card Playoff game and one Divisional Playoff game – and offers full streaming rights on NBC Sports.com and the NBC Sports App.
Emmy Award winners Cris Collinsworth and Mike Tirico follow all the action from the booth, along with Melissa Stark from the field.
Watch more from NFL on NBC YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/nflonnbc Visit NBC Sports: https://www.nbcsports.com Find NBC Sports on Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/NBCSports Follow NBC Sports on Twitter: https://twitter.com/nbcsports Follow NBC Sports on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/nbcsports/

entry.title: [NFLNBC] Geno Smith's case closed again; Raiders', Browns' QB battles | PFT PM (FULL) | NFL on NBC
entry.summary:
Mike Florio unpacks the latest news regarding Geno Smith's legal troubles, exploring how he avoided charges in Florida after his case was closed a second time. He also talks about Season 3 of Netflix's series Quarterback and shares some World Cup thoughts before ending the day by diving into the muddy quarterback rooms of the Cleveland Browns and Las Vegas Raiders. #NBCSports #NFL #profootballtalk » Watch Pro Football Talk live on Peacock weekdays 7a-9a: https://peacocktv.smart.link/v82e9dl56 » Subscribe to NFL on NBC: https://www.youtube.com/NFLonNBC?sub_confirmation=1 » Get the latest from Pro Football Talk: https://profootballtalk.nbcsports.com/
NBC Sports Group serves sports fans 24/7 with premier live events, insightful studio shows, and compelling original programming. NBC Sports is an established leader in the sports media landscape with an unparalleled collection of sports properties that include the Olympics, NFL, NBA, Premier League, Big Ten, NASCAR, PGA TOUR, the Kentucky Derby, Tour de France and many more. Subscribe to our channel for the latest sporting news and highlights!
Mike Florio, creator of the industry-leading Profootballtalk.com, offers his NFL insight alongside regular guests, including former NFL athletes such as Chris Simms. Pro Football Talk informs and entertains with the most up-to-date news and analysis surrounding the topical NFL stories of the day.

entry.content:
Mike Florio unpacks the latest news regarding Geno Smith's legal troubles, exploring how he avoided charges in Florida after his case was closed a second time. He also talks about Season 3 of Netflix's series Quarterback and shares some World Cup thoughts before ending the day by diving into the muddy quarterback rooms of the Cleveland Browns and Las Vegas Raiders. #NBCSports #NFL #profootballtalk

entry.title: [NFLNBC] Who will win the QB battle in Cleveland between Watson and Sanders? | Pro Football Talk | NFL on NBC
entry.summary:
Mike Florio breaks down the quarterback competition between Deshaun Watson and Shedeur Sanders, discussing how each player's offseason approach could influence the race for the starting job. #NBCSports #NFL #ProFootballTalk #WorldCup » Watch Pro Football Talk live on Peacock weekdays 7a-9a: https://peacocktv.smart.link/v82e9dl56 » Subscribe to NFL on NBC: https://www.youtube.com/NFLonNBC?sub_confirmation=1 » Get the latest from Pro Football Talk: https://profootballtalk.nbcsports.com/
